ddls:
CREATE TABLE "missions" (
  "mission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mission */,
  "mission_name" TEXT /* Name of the mission */,
  "destination" TEXT /* Destination star or location */,
  "mission_type" TEXT /* Type of mission (e.g., flyby, rendezvous) */,
  "planned_duration" INTEGER /* Planned duration of the mission in years */,
  "launch_date" TEXT /* Scheduled launch date */,
  "mission_status" TEXT /* Current status of the mission */,
  "budget" REAL /* Total budget allocated for the mission */,
  "projected_cost" REAL /* Projected cost of the mission */,
  "actual_cost" REAL /* Actual cost incurred for the mission */,
  "mission_leader_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user leading the mission */,
  "mission_objectives" TEXT /* Detailed description of the mission objectives */,
  "mission_risks" TEXT /* Description of potential risks and mitigation strategies */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_missions_mission_leader_id FOREIGN KEY ("mission_leader_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_missions_destination FOREIGN KEY ("destination") REFERENCES destinations ("destination_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mission_stages" (
  "stage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mission stage */,
  "mission_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the mission this stage belongs to */,
  "stage_name" TEXT /* Name of the mission stage (e.g., outbound, deceleration) */,
  "stage_description" TEXT /* Description of the mission stage's objectives and activities */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Planned start date for the stage */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Planned end date for the stage */,
  "actual_start_date" TEXT /* Actual start date of the stage */,
  "actual_end_date" TEXT /* Actual end date of the stage */,
  "stage_status" TEXT /* Status of the stage */,
  "stage_budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the stage */,
  "stage_actual_cost" REAL /* Actual cost incurred for the stage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mission_stages_mission_id FOREIGN KEY ("mission_id") REFERENCES missions ("mission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "propulsion_systems" (
  "propulsion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each propulsion system */,
  "stage_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the mission stage using this propulsion system */,
  "laser_power" REAL /* Laser power used in gigawatts */,
  "vehicle_mass" REAL /* Mass of the vehicle in metric tons */,
  "acceleration" REAL /* Acceleration in g-forces */,
  "sail_diameter" REAL /* Diameter of the sail in kilometers */,
  "max_velocity" REAL /* Maximum velocity as a percentage of the speed of light */,
  "propulsion_type" TEXT /* Type of propulsion system */,
  "efficiency" REAL /* Efficiency of the propulsion system */,
  "fuel_type" TEXT /* Type of fuel used (if applicable) */,
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the manufacturer of the propulsion system */,
  "maintenance_schedule" TEXT /* Maintenance schedule for the propulsion system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("propulsion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_propulsion_systems_manufacturer_id FOREIGN KEY ("manufacturer_id") REFERENCES component_manufacturers ("manufacturer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_propulsion_systems_stage_id FOREIGN KEY ("stage_id") REFERENCES mission_stages ("stage_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "destinations" (
  "destination_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each destination */,
  "destination_name" TEXT /* Name of the destination (e.g., Alpha Centauri) */,
  "distance_from_earth" REAL /* Distance from Earth in light-years */,
  "stellar_type" TEXT /* Type of the stellar object (e.g., star, planet) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the destination */,
  "environmental_conditions" TEXT /* Information about the environmental conditions at the destination */,
  "gravitational_field" REAL /* Gravitational field strength at the destination */,
  "orbital_characteristics" TEXT /* Orbital characteristics of the destination */,
  "known_hazards" TEXT /* Known hazards at the destination */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("destination_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mission_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mission report */,
  "mission_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the mission this report is for */,
  "report_title" TEXT /* Title of the mission report */,
  "report_content" TEXT /* Content of the mission report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report */,
  "report_author_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who authored the report */,
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who reviewed the report */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date the report was approved */,
  "publish_date" TEXT /* Date the report was published */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mission_reports_report_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_author_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mission_reports_mission_id FOREIGN KEY ("mission_id") REFERENCES missions ("mission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mission_reports_reviewer_id FOREIGN KEY ("reviewer_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, scientist, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the user */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the user */,
  "security_clearance_level" TEXT /* Security clearance level of the user */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the mission data */,
  "mission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the mission being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the mission data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used for access */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session in minutes */,
  "access_status" TEXT /* Status of the access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_mission_id FOREIGN KEY ("mission_id") REFERENCES missions ("mission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "simulation_results" (
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each simulation */,
  "mission_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the mission this simulation is for */,
  "simulation_name" TEXT /* Name of the simulation */,
  "parameters" TEXT /* Parameters used in the simulation */,
  "results" TEXT /* Results of the simulation */,
  "simulation_date" TEXT /* Date the simulation was run */,
  "simulation_type" TEXT /* Type of simulation */,
  "simulation_status" TEXT /* Status of the simulation */,
  "simulation_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the simulation in hours */,
  "energy_requirements" REAL /* Energy requirements for the simulation in gigawatts */,
  "travel_time" INTEGER /* Estimated travel time in days */,
  "velocity_profile" TEXT /* Velocity profile generated by the simulation */,
  "acceleration_profile" TEXT /* Acceleration profile generated by the simulation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("simulation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulation_results_mission_id FOREIGN KEY ("mission_id") REFERENCES missions ("mission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_designs" (
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle design */,
  "vehicle_name" TEXT /* Name of the vehicle */,
  "design_mass" REAL /* Designed mass of the vehicle in metric tons */,
  "payload_capacity" REAL /* Payload capacity of the vehicle in metric tons */,
  "structural_integrity" TEXT /* Structural integrity and materials used */,
  "design_date" TEXT /* Date the design was finalized */,
  "design_version" TEXT /* Version of the vehicle design */,
  "design_status" TEXT /* Status of the design */,
  "design_notes" TEXT /* Notes and comments about the design */,
  "designer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who designed the vehicle */,
  "manufacturing_cost" REAL /* Estimated manufacturing cost of the vehicle */,
  "testing_status" TEXT /* Status of the testing phase */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_designs_designer_id FOREIGN KEY ("designer_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_components" (
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle component */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the vehicle this component belongs to */,
  "component_name" TEXT /* Name of the component */,
  "component_type" TEXT /* Type of the component (e.g., engine, sail, habitat) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the component's function and specifications */,
  "component_version" TEXT /* Version of the component */,
  "component_status" TEXT /* Status of the component */,
  "component_notes" TEXT /* Notes and comments about the component */,
  "component_designer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who designed the component */,
  "component_manufacturing_cost" REAL /* Estimated manufacturing cost of the component */,
  "component_test_status" TEXT /* Status of the testing phase */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_components_component_designer_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_designer_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_components_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicle_designs ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "component_manufacturers" (
  "manufacturer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each manufacturer */,
  "manufacturer_name" TEXT /* Name of the manufacturer */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the manufacturer */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the manufacturer is located */,
  "company_website" TEXT /* Website of the manufacturer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the manufacturer */,
  "company_address" TEXT /* Physical address of the manufacturer */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the contact person at the manufacturer */,
  "quality_assurance_certificate" TEXT /* Information about the quality assurance certificates held by the manufacturer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("manufacturer_id")
)
